issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, such as API failures or missing indices.

scenarios.name: Create a logs-* data view with a runtime field and a read-only payments team space
scenarios.rationale: Treatment POSTed to /api/data_views/data_view with runtimeFieldMap (hour_of_day painless script), created a space via /api/spaces/space with disabledFeatures, and used a document-level-security role via _security/role with a query restricting service.name; baseline only mentioned doing it in the UI without API payload shapes or runtime fields.

scenarios.name: Backup a dashboard and set up an alert when payment-service errors exceed 50/5min
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used /api/saved_objects/_export with includeReferencesDeep and /api/saved_objects/_import?overwrite=true producing NDJSON, plus /api/alerting/rule with rule_type_id '.es-query', timeWindowSize/Unit, thresholdComparator and a slack connector action; baseline suggested Watcher or generic Elasticsearch alerting without the Kibana alerting rule schema.
